data.title: PNC Financial Gears Up For Q1 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
data.description: PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: PNC) is set to announce its first quarter earnings on April 15. Analysts are anticipating earnings of $3.93 per share, a growth from $3.51 per share in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is expected to reach around $6.21 billion, compared to $5.45 billion the previous year. The company recently declared a quarterly dividend of $1.70 per share. Despite this, PNC Financial's shares closed at $221.13, down 0.9% on Friday. For more details and analyst insights, visit Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page.

data.title: Will Dogecoin See A 30% Breakout? Top Analyst Sees 'Substantially' High Chances Amid This 'Buy' Signal
data.description: A well-known cryptocurrency expert pointed out an increased likelihood of Dogecoin experiencing a significant 30% breakout soon. Ali Martinez highlighted a descending triangle pattern on Dogecoin's 4-hour chart, indicating that as Dogecoin approaches the apex of the triangle, the probability of a 30% price movement rises. Martinez did not specify if the movement would be upward or downward. Should a 30% surge occur, Dogecoin could hit $0.11, reaching levels seen in early February. This prediction aligns with Martinez's previous comments, consistently suggesting a notable move for DOGE. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: EduBlock Pro Wins STPI Award at TiECON Chandigarh 2026, Cementing Its Position as India's Most Trusted Blockchain-Powered Exam Integrity Platform
data.description: In Mohali, the STPI Incubation Center has honored EduBlock Pro, developed by Antier, for its innovative role in establishing a secure and tamper-proof examination system in India. Vikram Raj Singh, the CEO & Founder of Antier, accepted the award. This recognition was achieved on April 13, 2026, in Chandigarh.
